scripts.test:e2e:supabase: KMSF_AUTH_PROVIDER=supabase KMSF_E2E_REMOTE_SUPABASE=1 KMSF_SETUP_CONFIG_FILE=${KMSF_SETUP_CONFIG_FILE:-setup.codex-supabase-e2e.json} env -u NO_COLOR playwright test --grep @supabase-remote
scripts.test:e2e:supabase:initial: KMSF_AUTH_PROVIDER=supabase KMSF_E2E_REMOTE_SUPABASE=1 KMSF_SETUP_CONFIG_FILE=${KMSF_SETUP_CONFIG_FILE:-setup.codex-supabase-initial-e2e.json} npm run test:reset-auth && KMSF_AUTH_PROVIDER=supabase KMSF_E2E_REMOTE_SUPABASE=1 KMSF_SETUP_CONFIG_FILE=${KMSF_SETUP_CONFIG_FILE:-setup.codex-supabase-initial-e2e.json} env -u NO_COLOR playwright test tests/e2e/supabase-auth.spec.ts --grep @supabase-remote
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test:run && npm run build
scripts.verify:full: npm run verify && npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/layout-shell.spec.ts tests/e2e/gnb-layout-settings.spec.ts tests/e2e/language-toggle.spec.ts tests/e2e/auth-validation-i18n.spec.ts tests/e2e/typography-pages.spec.ts
